description: CompositionWhite round neck kurta made of 100% cotton, has short puff sleeves with a cut out design, sequins and cut out design on the front and an asymmetric hemFitRegularWash careHand wash separately in cold waterDo not bleach, do not wringDry in shadeMedium to hot ironThis kurta from biba has a great asymmetric shape making this a figure flattering choice. Pair it with leggings or jeans and flats for an ultra femme look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
